name: Argyle
description: Real-time payroll and employment data API for verifications and event-driven workflows.

seo.title: Argyle — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Argyle: Real-time payroll and employment data API for verifications and event-driven workflows.

when_to_use: Real-time income verification for mortgage and loan applications
Automating payroll direct deposit switching for fintechs
Pulling employment history data for background check workflows
Event-driven payroll webhooks for earned wage access apps
Connecting gig worker income data to financial apps

pros: Real-time payroll data beats file-based snapshots
Direct deposit switching reduces churn friction
Coverage across major US gig and W-2 platforms
cons: Consumer-permission model adds friction to funnels
US payroll coverage uneven for smaller employers
review.verdict: Strong real-time payroll API for lenders and fintechs, but consumer-consent friction is real.
review.best_for: US lenders and fintechs needing live income and employment data
review.not_for: Teams outside US or needing batch file-based payroll access
